title: State Election Access Is Cut Below the Democratic Floor
description: A state narrows access to state and local elections by ending automatic registration, eliminating early voting, and restricting absentee voting to narrow excuse categories. The scenario tests whether Article X's state-election voting-access floor now operates as a real constitutional backstop rather than leaving state election access largely outside the draft's enforceable protections.

details.measures: ending automatic registration for state elections, eliminating early voting, and restricting absentee voting to a narrow list of statutory excuses
